case_title: IRMA E. CORDOBA et al VS. SABRINA VOTO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, INFORMING COURT OF CURRENT ADDRESS AND NAME CORRECTION FOR PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORDOBA, HAROLD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDOBA, IRMA E. CORDOBA, HAROLD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOTO, SABRINA $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,580.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (C) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-26-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY EXCEPT IRMA CORDOVA WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED AUG-20-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VOTO, SABRINA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CORDOBA, IRMA E. CORDOBA, HAROLD AS TO DEFENDANT VOTO, SABRINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS (2) , ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2014 - JUDGMENT.
